releaseNotes:
🔥 War Mode Edition (V05.04.2026) is ready for deployment!

• Launched Prep-Meter Ecosystem with high-intensity accountability
• Added Monthly Strategic Review for cumulative analytics
• Enhanced Tactical Calendar with Hover Intel and Context Menus
• Implemented Target Exam Countdown & Commander's Oath
• New Splash Engine with 40+ psychological insights
• Fixed background process persistence (Hard-Kill logic)
• Professional-grade installer with active process detection

changelogArray: Launched Prep-Meter Ecosystem 2.0 with high-intensity accountability
Added Monthly Strategic Review for cumulative performance analytics
Enhanced Tactical Calendar with Hover Intel and Smart Context Menus
Implemented Target Exam Countdown and Commander's Oath for logs
New Randomized Splash Engine with 40+ psychological and focus insights
Fixed background process persistence with new Hard-Kill logic
Professional-grade installer with active process detection
knownIssues: HEIC export falls back to JPEG (system codec limitation)
